name: @tsnuke/format-effect
description: Effect-TS slice for tsnuke's PURE output formatters: formatAgentReport (RULE-032 cheapest-action-first agent report), renderScoreLine/renderPretty (terminal output), and the offline explain/explainDiagnostic (--explain text). Plain pure functions over structural inputs — consumes @tsnuke/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contract. NOT Effect-wrapped (no IO).
